body:
Move default fluxnet plots to extension LandSimulations.

New plots for fluxnet sites (US-Var)
[diurnal_timeseries.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/21498851/diurnal_timeseries.pdf)
[variable_timeseries.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/21498852/variable_timeseries.pdf)


## To-do
Write diagnostics to a csv to make it easier for someone to make their own plots if they wish to. [future PR]
Update fluxnet tutorial to use this [future PR]

## Content
Moves diurnal average computation and plotting scripts to ext

- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included

- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

title: Fluxnet plotting
